Text messaging application implementation for Pebble devices, with contact management and metadata functions.


## Files
- **[send_text.c](send_text.c.md)**: Implements a text messaging application for Pebble devices, managing contacts and sending messages.
- **[send_text.h](send_text.h.md)**: Declares a function to get metadata information for the send text app.
- **[send_text_app_prefs.h](send_text_app_prefs.h.md)**: Defines data structures for serialized send text contact preferences, including contact and address UUIDs.
